subcodes.first_line: O thou august offshoot of the sacred Lote-Tree! Some time ago, thou hadst written about the restoration of the heavenly point of adoration and the celestial Kaʿbih, and a response was sent to thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه چندی از پیش در خصوص تعمیر مطاف ملکوتیان
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
